creator: unixmania@gmail.com
text:
The Brazillian Infomation and Coordination Center (http://www.NIC.br) is the official entity responsible for Internet administracion in Brazil. They started to provide official NTP support for Brazillian users by means of 3 servers based on an atomic clock. More datails in http://www.ntp.br/faq.html (only in Portuguese).

Fix: Apply the attached patch

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Not Applicable
